title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason reviews several AI agent frameworks and techniques including Autoresearch, AutoAgent, Claude Code's 3-layer memory system, Hermes' self-evolution mechanism, and Openclaw's self-evolving skills. The video demonstrates agent capabilities through practical examples and comparisons.
